\tzpentry{ID4242}{Text Gravitational Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4242 introduces Text Gravitational Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\text{Gravitational Field} \\propto \\nabla^2 \\Phi_{\\text{TZP}} \\propto \\frac{1}{(r - r_c)^3}$$
